title: T1: Implement prepare_run and load_or_get_module
description: Refactor python_loader.py to add per-run scoped sys.modules snapshot/restore. Remove load_module_from_path. Add load_or_get_module that raises RuntimeError outside prepare_run.

title: T2: Migrate run_gen to prepare_run
description: Update commands/gen.py to wrap module-loading loop in prepare_run + load_or_get_module.

title: T3: Migrate test helpers to prepare_run
description: Update tests/test_view_{py,cpp,sv}.py to use prepare_run + load_or_get_module.

title: T4: Add tests/test_loader.py
description: Snapshot/restore, sequential fixture isolation, within-run identity stability, RuntimeError outside prepare_run.

title: T5: Capture perf baseline + tests/test_perf_gen.py
description: Capture pre-Commit-A perf baseline; add env-gated perf harness.

title: T6: Commit-A integration check
description: Run full suite, basedpyright zero errors, commit as Commit A.

title: T7: Add build_repo_type_index
description: Create src/piketype/ir/repo_index.py with (module, name)-keyed dict; add unit test.

title: T8: Plumb repo-wide index through SV emitter and view
description: Update emit_sv and view.py for repo_type_index; remove module-local lookup shortcut.

title: T9: Plumb repo-wide index through Python emitter and view
description: Same as T8 for Python backend.

title: T10: Plumb repo-wide index through C++ emitter and view
description: Same as T8 for C++ backend.

title: T11: Commit-B integration check
description: Full suite green, basedpyright zero errors, perf passes, commit as Commit B.

title: T12: Implement _collect_module_dependencies
description: Walk module IR for cross-module TypeRefIR/ConstRefExprIR; populate ModuleIR.dependencies. Add R8 invariant docstring.

title: T13: Remove cross-module rejection in validate/engine.py
description: Remove engine.py:69-73; update unknown-target lookup and error message.

title: T14: Update manifest serializer for dependencies
description: Serialize ModuleIR.dependencies as {target_module, kind} entries; preserve [] for empty.

title: T15: Add freeze unit tests
description: Cross-module TypeRefIR/ConstRefExprIR + dependency collection.

title: T16: Add validation unit tests for unknown-type rejection
description: Direct RepoIR construction for FR-5 unknown-type.

title: T17: Commit-C integration check
description: Full suite green, basedpyright zero errors, commit as Commit C.

title: T18: Refactor SV view.py:704 into template
description: Move existing same-module synth import into module_test.j2; uses module.ref.basename.

title: T19: Add SV cross-module import view-model fields and template rendering
description: Add basename-only fields; render imports via templates; FR-9/FR-10 layout (CL-1, CL-3).

title: T20: Add Python cross-module import view-model field and template rendering
description: PyCrossModuleImportView with target_types_module + wrapper_class_name; FR-11 layout (CL-2).

title: T21: Add C++ cross-module include + qualified field type
description: cross_module_include_paths field; fully-qualified field type via _build_namespace_view; FR-12.

title: T22: Create cross-module primary fixture
description: tests/fixtures/cross_module_type_refs/ with foo.py + bar.py covering all 4 type kinds.

title: T23: Generate primary fixture goldens
description: Run piketype gen and commit goldens; manually verify against spec example.

title: T24: Add tests/test_no_inline_imports.py
description: AC-23 AST static check with positive AND negative test cases.

title: T25: Add cross-module integration test
description: tests/test_gen_cross_module.py byte-comparing gen output against goldens; idempotency case.

title: T26: Generate --namespace=proj::lib goldens + namespace integration test
description: AC-6 user-namespace path coverage.

title: T26b: Same-process IR identity test (AC-7 part 2)
description: Load cross_module_type_refs twice in same process; deep-compare RepoIR.

title: T27: Python runtime byte-value test (AC-19)
description: bar_t round-trip + explicit byte-value assertion.

title: T28: Commit-D integration check
description: Full suite green, AC-23 empty, basedpyright zero, commit as Commit D.

title: T29: Replace _validate_struct_cycles with repo-level pass
description: Repo-level graph; FR-6 N-node deterministic phrasing.

title: T30: Implement _validate_cross_module_name_conflicts
description: Four FR-8 sub-rules: local-vs-imported, imported-vs-imported, imported-vs-imported enum literal, local-vs-imported enum literal.

title: T31: Add validation tests for FR-6 + FR-8
description: Cycles 2-node, 3-node, mixed; four FR-8 sub-cases via direct RepoIR.

title: T32: Make check_duplicate_basenames unconditional + update message (FR-9a)
description: Move out of --namespace gate; update error message; add test.

title: T33: Add cross_module_struct_multiple_of fixture + goldens + test
description: Cross-module multiple_of alignment fixture.

title: T34: Add cycle fixture or RepoIR-only test
description: Python-loadable cycle fixture if feasible; else RepoIR-only test.

title: T35: Commit-E integration check
description: Full suite green, basedpyright zero, commit as Commit E.

title: T36: Replace constitution constraint #4
description: Apply FR-15 exact replacement text to .steel/constitution.md.

title: T37: Commit-F integration check + final verification
description: Full suite, AC-23 empty, basedpyright zero, perf within budget, NFR-3 dep check, commit as Commit F.
